channel.title: buzzword on Fundor 333
channel.description: Recent content in buzzword on Fundor 333

item.title: Buzzwords buzzwords
item.description: Test buzzword $(function () { count = 0; wordsArray = [“Big data”, “Blockchain”, “Cloud”, “Cross-platform”, “Deep learning”, “DevOps”, “Machine Learning”, “Microservices”, “Real-time”, “Scalability”, “Think outside the box”, “Web 2.0”, “Wev 3.0” ]; setInterval(function () { count++; $(“.buzzword”).fadeOut(400, functi $(this).text(wordsArray[count % wordsArray.length]).fadeIn(400); }); }, 2000); }); title: ‘Buzzwords buzzwords’ date: 2019-06-15 10:00:00 +0000 feature_image: “/uploads/words.jpg” tags: - tecnology - buzzword - rant categories: - dev slug: buzzwords-buzzwords description: Un rant sulle buzzwords
